text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ngh. My nose is so itchy.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mm... Well, King put some cream on my pimple.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But it feels sticky and its smell is making my nose
all itchy... Eugh.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I just want that pimple to go awaaay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara seems very worried about her skin
problems.
